title: sabazia elata
intro: Sabazia elata, also known as Sabazia or Purple Sage, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sabazia elata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Sabazia elata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
